query: UPDATE analyses SET status = 'error', errorMessage = 'Analysis timed out - stuck in processing', updatedAt = NOW() WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'processing' AND updatedAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR);
